title: Error codes
excerpt: description: Reference of R2 error codes returned by the Workers API and S3-compatible API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. This page documents error codes returned by R2 when using the [Workers API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/api/workers/) or the [S3-compatible API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/api/s3/), along with recommended fixes to help with troubleshooting. For the **Workers API**, R2 operations throw exceptions that you can catch. The error code is included at the end of the `message` property:
